description_long: This is a classical stone fountain with a rectangular base and a central vertical column adorned with ornate sculptural details. The front and back faces feature prominent lion head reliefs, with the lion's mouth serving as a spout for water. Flanking the central column on both sides are semi-circular basins with fluted undersides, designed to catch and hold water. The fountain is constructed from weathered stone, giving it a historic and monumental appearance, and sits atop a broad, square plinth. Decorative rosettes and fluted patterns embellish the sides of the column, adding to its architectural elegance. The overall design suggests a public or park setting, intended as both a functional water feature and a decorative landmark.
description: A classical stone fountain with lion head spouts, semi-circular basins, and ornate sculptural details on a square plinth. The weathered stone and decorative motifs give it a historic, monumental look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lion head relief with an open mouth spout and the semi-circular basin beneath, all set on a square plinth.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the decorative rosette motif on the column and the full profile of the semi-circular basin, with no lion head visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, featuring another lion head spout and basin, but with more visible weathering and discoloration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rosette motif and the basin, with a circular opening where a spout may be missing.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features sculpted lion head reliefs on two sides, serving as spouts, and decorative rosette motifs on the other two sides. Fluted patterns adorn the undersides of the basins, and the column is topped with classical architectural detailing.
attribute_basin_structure: The fountain has two semi-circular basins on opposite sides, each with a fluted underside and a thick, rounded rim. The basins are integrated into the central structure and are designed to catch water from the lion head spouts.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the design suggests water would flow gently from the lion mouths into the basins.
